extract: Yamask (Japanese: デスマス Desumasu) is a Ghost-type Pokémon introduced in Generation V. It evolves into Cofagrigus starting at level 34. In Galar, Yamask has a dual-type Ground/Ghost regional form. It evolves into Runerigus when the player travels under a specific arch in the overworld after Yamask takes at least 49 HP in damage from attacks without fainting. (Refer to Game data→Evolution data for more details.)
